positive: A vintage botanical diagram of a mythical bioluminescent flower. The illustration should resemble an antique scientific plate from the Victorian era, complete with detailed cross-hatching, delicate ink work, and scientific labels (without actual text). Emerald green, deep purple, and sepia tones. Highly detailed etching style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern art, graffiti, photorealistic
